title: 4 Business-Software Services Stocks to Watch in a Thriving Industry
text: The Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, GWRE and PLUS are poised to continue benefiting from the increasing demand for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions amid the accelerated digital transformation and a shift to cloud initiatives.

title: Tyler Technologies: Transition To Cloud Is Progressing Well
text: TYL's transition from on-premise users to the cloud is progressing well. TYL benefits from a strong demand for its information management solutions, driven by the increasing complexity and volume of data handled by government organizations.

title: Tyler Technologies Announces 2023 Public Sector Excellence Award Winners
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announces its 2023 Public Sector Excellence Award winners.

title: Tyler Technologies Releases 2022 Corporate Responsibility Report
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has published its fourth annual corporate responsibility report.

title: Tyler Technologies Announces 2023 Maine App Challenge Winners
text: YARMOUTH, Maine--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that three high school students from Maine were selected as winners of the 2023 Maine App Challenge.
